note: seq=20: MX qualifier/enricher layered on CT/SSL (seq-19). Resolves MX/provider for fresh CT domains -> qualified+enriched real-time leads. Recurring 5-min + recheck loop; fail-soft.

steps.note: seq=20: MX qualifier layered on the CT/SSL lane (seq-19). For each freshly CT-discovered domain: async-resolve MX(+A,+NS), classify provider (Google Workspace/M365/Zoho/...), set has_business_email -> qualifies (real operating business vs parked) + enriches the lead. Recurring 5-min timer + recheck loop (MX often appears hours after the cert). Fail-soft: 0 new = exit 0 (never wedges the timer).

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=ATLAS MX qualifier/enricher for the CT/SSL lane (resolve MX/A/NS, classify provider, qualify fresh leads)
Documentation=https://github.com/cloudwalker171/atlas-manifests
After=network-online.target postgresql.service atlas-ct-newssl.service
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=oneshot
Nice=10
Environment=ATLAS_DB_ENV=/etc/atlas/db.env
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/importers/mx_qualify_import.py
TimeoutStartSec=15min

[Unit]
Description=Run ATLAS MX qualifier every 5 min (qualify new CT domains + due rechecks)

[Timer]
OnBootSec=4min
OnUnitActiveSec=5min
Persistent=true
Unit=atlas-mx-qualify.service

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import hashlib,sys; w={'/opt/atlas/importers/mx_qualify_import.py':'14013122a6f3a5284dfd06e1211b0fac668cd20af2b7db14166fa30e8889ae3e'}; [sys.exit('SHA MISMATCH '+p) for p,h in w.items() if hashlib.sha256(open(p,'rb').read()).hexdigest()!=h]; print('sha ok')"
